name: Unclogged
short_description: Unclogged is a puzzle horror escape game. Collect items, solve puzzles, unclog the toilet, and hopefully make an escape.
detailed_description:
Unclogged is a first-person, puzzle, horror, escape game. Persist through the insidious ambience of this strange house, collecting items required for you to solve a series of puzzles and make your escape. The only thing standing between you and your freedom is your own mind and a clogged toilet. Will you be able to unclog the pipes and make your way out, or will you be stuck in this ominous house without a working toilet forever?


Gameplay includes exploring an unnerving house, interacting with elements of the environment, looking for items, and solving riddles and puzzles.

The game itself takes 40-60 minutes to complete.

Game Features
  • Walking simulator
  • Multiple riddles and puzzles
  • Realistic Graphics
  • Immersive Audio
  • Single-slot save system

Controls
  • WASD - Move
  • Spacebar - Jump
  • Control - Crouch
  • F - Flashlight
  • E - Interact
  • I - Inventory
  • Mouse - Look
